name: Mazetti
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef (or leftover cooked meat)
8 oz Wide egg noodles, uncooked (1 package)
4 oz Mushrooms, stems and pieces undrained (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the meat in a skillet and drain well.
2. Add the meat, uncooked noodles, and remaining ingredients except cheese to a slow cooker.
3. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 hours, or until the noodles are tender.
4. Top with cheese, cover, and cook until the cheese melts.
